title: Other Revenues: Gifts and Solicitations
description: Conroe ISD's guidelines on gifts and solicitations explain how the district handles donations, fundraising activities, and requests for money or goods from outside sources. The policy helps ensure that gifts and fundraising efforts benefit students fairly and that outside groups follow district rules before collecting money or materials on school campuses. Parents and community members can look to this policy to understand what kinds of contributions are accepted and how solicitation activities are managed across the district.
